overall.description: Stationary viewpoint in a cyberpunk video game city street, featuring a prominent digital billboard glitching between advertisement and blue geometric patterns. Futuristic vehicles pass continuously on the multi-lane road while neon signs illuminate the commercial buildings, with two pedestrians crossing midway through the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk beneath overhead walkway with digital advertising kiosk

events.description: digital billboard glitches and displays blue geometric pattern instead of the advertisement
two pedestrians enter from left side and cross the street in front of the billboard
billboard glitches again showing fragmented image before returning to normal display

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on the sidewalk observing the passing traffic and malfunctioning digital advertisement

notable_agents.action: two individuals crossing the street from left to right during the 28-32 second window

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying 'Splishin' Missionados' advertisement with colorful monster graphic and 'EXPLOSION OF TASTE' text
commercial building facade with large cyan neon 'SECURITY SERVICE' signage and dark entrance
multi-story building with purple 'WNSA' signage and various upper billboards
metal walkway structure with industrial beams spanning across the street above the road

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from a covered sidewalk in a cyberpunk city, dominated by a glitching digital advertisement for 'Splishin' Missionados' in the center. To the right, a building displays bright cyan 'SECURITY SERVICE' neon signage, while futuristic vehicles continuously pass on the multi-lane street. Two pedestrians briefly cross the street around the 28-second mark, and the billboard intermittently glitches to blue geometric patterns throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of a bustling cyberpunk street where a flickering digital landscape creates a sense of technological instability. It begins from the shelter of a covered sidewalk, focusing on a central digital advertisement for Splishin' Missionados that intermittently glitches into blue geometric patterns. As the scene unfolds, the gaze expands to include the surrounding commercial architecture, highlighted by the bright cyan glow of a Security Service neon sign to the right. The flow of the city continues with futuristic vehicles streaming across the multi-lane road, while two pedestrians briefly cross the street, adding a layer of human movement to the neon-lit environment.
